calendar.matters:
Motion To Set Aside Dismissal And For Entry Of Judgment Pursuant To Stipulation Of The Parties (Motions)
Off Calendar Oct-05-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF FIA CARD SERVICES, N.A.'s Motion To Set Aside Dismissal And For Entry Of Judgment Pursuant To Stipulation Of The Parties.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Plaintiff's unopposed "motion to set aside dismissal and for entry of judgment pursuant to stipulation of the parties" is granted.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare and submit a proposed order which states that the motion was not opposed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/RBU)

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
